name: ubaka-tech-ecosystem-monorepo
description: Unified monorepo workspace for Ubaka Tech ecosystem applications

scripts.dev:ubaka: concurrently "npm run dev -w ubakatech/ubakatech-backend" "npm run dev -w ubakatech/ubakatech-frontend"
scripts.dev:kurimacye: concurrently "npm run dev -w kurimacye/kurimacye-backend" "npm run dev -w kurimacye/kurimacye-frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build -w ubakatech/ubakatech-backend && npm run build -w ubakatech/ubakatech-frontend
scripts.build:ubaka: npm run build -w ubakatech/ubakatech-backend && npm run build -w ubakatech/ubakatech-frontend
